description:
Immunet, powered by [ClamAV](https://www.clamav.net/) is a fast, fully featured Windows desktop anti-virus solution that utilizes the power of advanced cloud based detection techniques and the strength of the time tested ClamAV engine. This unique combination of technologies allows for a highly effective approach to today’s fast moving malware threats.

## Features

* Real-time Detection
* Scheduled Scanning
* Intelligent Scanning - Fast and configurable smart scans
* Custom Detection - Using the standard ClamAV signature language
* Advanced Archive and Packer Support
* Fast and Light System Footprint
* Quarantine

## Notes

This package always installs the latest version of the application, regardless of the version specified in the package.
summary: A malware and antivirus protection system that utilizes cloud computing to provide enhanced community-based security.
author: Cisco Systems
